title: Re-employment after retirement at a specified age
content:
(1)	
Where a continuous contract of employment specifies an age 
of retirement and— (Amended 4 of 2022 s. 15)
	
(a)	
the employee retires at that age; and
	
(b)	
the employee has been employed under that contract for 
not less than 5 years of service ending at the relevant 
date; and (Amended 74 of 1997 s. 14)
	
(c)	
(Repealed 4 of 2022 s. 15)
	
(d)	
the long service payment to which the employee would 
have been entitled had the employee been dismissed at 
the relevant date were wholly available to be reduced 
under section 31Y; and (Replaced 4 of 2022 s. 15)
	
(e)	
immediately after his retirement, the employee is re-
employed by the person by whom he was employed 
immediately before his retirement,
then for the purposes of Parts VA and VB of this Ordinance, 
the employment after retirement shall be regarded as a fresh 
employment.
	
(2)	
(Repealed 4 of 2022 s. 15)
(Amended 41 of 1990 s. 16)
